response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC (37%) is below our minimum sharing threshold (60%), and grid islanding with local stress requires preserving reserves; geographic round-robin will cycle back to r2c1 when our SoC recovers.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.6, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Islanded grid in local energy crisis; SoC 37% with 1 kW load. Neighbors also stressed (SoC 35–49%). Accepting inbound offers but minimizing outbound shares until SoC recovers above 60%. Geographic round-robin fallback active..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
